Chat Edit: '2. REAL HTTP CLIENT (Not Stubs)
Missing: Working TLS socket code to talk to Ollama (localhost:11434 is HTTP, but you need WinHTTP or raw sockets)
Missing: JSON parser that actually works on the response (not just string searching)
Missing: Streaming response handler (chunked transfer encoding)
Current State: You have invoke WinHttpOpen but no error handling when it returns NULL

Add this as well as before'
